EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The permission "{object.new_value}" for space "{datafield1}" is granted to the user {object.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
The permission "{object.value}" for space "{datafield1}" is revoked from the user {object.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
The permission "{object.new_value}" for space "{datafield1}" is granted to the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The permission "{object.value}" for space "{datafield1}" is revoked from the group "{object.account.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The permission "{object.new_value}" for space "{datafield1}" is granted to the group "{object.account.group}" on host {event_src.host}
